reasoning: Koren, to improve your major limiter of poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, we're focusing on over-unders. This session targets your 5 to 20-minute power drop by simulating the demands you'll face on the Alpine Loop, specifically the key climb from Sundance to Cascade Springs. Last ride's effort shows a solid base, now let's push it further.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 6 x 5-min blocks alternating 2 min at 242-256W and 3 min at 201-218W. Recover at 209W between blocks.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
